title: How to Use this Manual
body_text:
How to Use this Manual
1	Legal Notices
1.1	Copyright & Disclaimer
Except as expressly permitted in the Payment Solutions Manual or by the provisions of the
Copyright Act
, no part of the Payment Solutions Manual, including forms or documents on the Central 1 extranet, or any other materials on the Central 1 extranet may be reproduced without the written permission of Central 1 Credit Union.
The Payment Solutions Manual and the forms and documents on the Central 1 extranet are protected by copyright law in Canada and internationally.
The doing of an unauthorized act in relation to a copyrighted work may result in both a civil claim for damages and criminal prosecution.
While Central 1 Credit Union has taken reasonable steps to ensure the accuracy of the information and materials in the Payment Solutions Manual and the forms and documents on the Central 1 extranet, Central 1 Credit Union cannot accept responsibility for the use made of the information and materials in the Payment Solutions Manual, including any use made of the forms and documents on the Central 1 extranet. The content is provided for general reference only and is not intended to be legal, accounting, or tax advice. Its quality, accuracy, and completeness are not warranted or guaranteed and Central 1 Credit Union does not undertake any responsibility for updating the content at any particular time or to any particular degree. Every user is ultimately responsible for its own use of the information and materials in the Payment Solutions Manual, including any use made of the forms and documents on the Central 1 extranet. Obtain advice from appropriate professionals.
Central 1 Credit Union is not responsible for any errors or omissions contained in the Payment Solutions Manual, including the forms and documents on the Central 1 extranet, and expressly disclaims liability, whether under contract or in negligence or otherwise, to any user and other persons who may use the Payment Solutions Manual or the forms or documents on the Central 1 extranet, and to members, clients, and customers of such users, and other persons.
Central 1 Credit Union expressly disclaims liability for loss or damage, whether direct or indirect, resulting from any use of the Payment Solutions Manual or forms or documents on the Central 1 extranet, including, without limitation, any loss or damage arising as a result of any information, material, documents, or forms contained in the Payment Solutions Manual or forms or documents on the Central 1 extranet being determined not to be valid or enforceable or not attaining the end desired by the user.
1.2	Google Analytics Cookie Policy
Usage of the Payment Solutions Manual is measured using Google Analytics.
Google Analytics uses cookies to collect standard Internet log information. A cookie is a small file stored on your computer. Google Analytics cookies generate information about usage patterns, including when users start and stop using the
Payment Solutions Manual, how users navigate the Payment Solutions Manual, and the number and times of previous visits to the Payment Solutions Manual.
The information generated by the cookies about your use of the Payment Solutions Manual is transmitted to Google. This information is completely anonymous. No personal information is recorded or provided to Google.
This anonymous and non-personal information is compiled into statistical reports used by Central 1 to further enhance the Payment Solutions Manual.
You may opt out of being tracked by Google Analytics cookies by disabling or refusing the cookies, by disabling JavaScript within the browser, or by using the Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on.
Disabling Google Analytics cookies or JavaScript will still permit you to access the Payment Solutions Manual. Please be aware that restricting cookies or JavaScript may impact the functionality of other websites you visit.
The Payment Solutions Manual includes links to other websites that are not covered by this Cookie Policy.
1.3	External Website Links
Links to external websites have been independently developed by parties other than Central 1. When you select one of those links, you are contacting another website. Those websites are independent and may be subject to separate agreements that govern their use. Central 1 does not guarantee the accuracy of information contained in such sites. Central 1 has no control over, and no responsibility or liability for, other websites or their collection, use, and disclosure of personal information. The listing of an organization should not be construed as an endorsement of its products or services. Links are provided for convenience only and you assume all risks resulting from accessing or using such other websites.
END
